_comment: Channel registry for sar-inbox and sar-reply. Maps logical names to channel IDs for Teams, Slack, email lists.

teams._how_to_find: In Teams, go to the channel → ... → Get link to channel. The URL contains team_id and channel_id.

slack._status: NOT YET CONNECTED — Slack MCP not registered in ~/.wibey/mcp.json
slack._todo: Register Slack MCP when available. See SLACK-TODO markers in sar-inbox/SKILL.md and sar-reply/SKILL.md.
